title: mischocarpus pyriformis subsp. retusus
intro: Mischocarpus pyriformis subsp. retusus is a plant species, commonly known as the quandong, which is native to Australia and is part of the Anacardiaceae family. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where its fruit, bark, and leaves are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mischocarpus pyriformis subsp. retusus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
